No empty state for new users with no videos
No error handling for upload failures

Vanity metrics in quick stats (counts without context)

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader + PageContainer pattern (consistent). 4-tab structure similar to other hubs but with more placeholders. Color scheme (green) consistent with trening area.
